positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial map illustration featuring interconnected constellations made of glowing gold lines on a deep indigo midnight blue background. The main subject is a stylized, abstract representation of a glowing moon and a cluster of bright stars forming the shape of a mythical forest silhouette. Use a detailed, fine line etching style mixed with neon bioluminescence accents. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical for print. High contrast, ethereal glow effect, vector quality, clean silhouette, suitable for T-shirt graphic.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, low detail, bad anatomy, noise, messy lines, gradient, photographic, realistic, grain, dirty, extra limbs, complex background, excessive color variation
